zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Marshal於大約1210年出生時，她的父親William Marshal Earl of Pembroke65歲，母親Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke39歲。她於大約1222年與Warin de Munchensy在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1234年11月之前。

nameMeanings.name: Marshal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Marshall  .

variants.name: Marshall
meanings: English: usually an occupational name ‘farrier’, occasionally a status name ‘chief official of a royal household or court; a high officer of state’, from Middle English mareshal and Old French maresc(h)al. An even wider range of meanings is found in some other languages: compare for example Polish Marszałek (see Marszalek ). This name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century. It is also borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Marshal was born about 1210, her father, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, was 65 and her mother, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, was 39. She married Warin de Munchensy about 1222, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before November 1234.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Marshal est née environ 1210, son père, William Marshal Earl of Pembroke, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Warin de Munchensy environ 1222, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant novembre 1234.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Marshal um 1210 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Marshal Earl of Pembroke 65 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke 39. Sie hat um 1222 in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales Warin de Munchensy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor November 1234.

Lei sposato Warin de Munchensy circa 1222, nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del novembre 1234.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Marshal(이)가 대략 1210년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Marshal Earl of Pembroke(은)는 65세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1222년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 Warin de Munchensy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1234년 11월 이전 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Warin de Munchensy aproximadamente 1222, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes novembro de 1234.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Marshal родилась около 1210 г., её отцу по имени William Marshal Earl of Pembroke было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Clare Countess of Pembroke, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Warin de Munchensy около 1222 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед ноябрь 1234 г.
